div.p: This value set expansion contains 10 concepts.

td.a: Client's age is less than 12 months-42

tr.td: Client's age is less than 12 months

td.a: Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination-48

tr.td: Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination

td.a: No hepatitis A primary series doses were administered-131

tr.td: No hepatitis A primary series doses were administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hepatitis A-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 0

td.a: Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months-42

tr.td: Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months

td.a: Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination-44

tr.td: Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination

td.a: One hepatitis A primary series dose was administered-131

tr.td: One hepatitis A primary series dose was administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hepatitis A-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1

td.a: The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered less than 6 months ago-115

tr.td: The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered less than 6 months ago

div.p: Today's date − "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Hepatitis A-containing vaccines") < 6 months

td.a: The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered more than 6 months ago-115

tr.td: The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered more than 6 months ago

div.p: Today's date − "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Hepatitis A-containing vaccines") ≥ 6 months

td.a: Two hepatitis A primary series doses were administered-131

tr.td: Two hepatitis A primary series doses were administered

div.p: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hepatitis A-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2

td.a: Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete-158

tr.td: Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete

div.p: "Immunization recommendation status" = "Complete" "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "Hepatitis A-containing vaccines")

description.value: ValueSet IMMZD2DTHepatitisAInactivatedHAV2Doses for IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis A.Inactivated HAV 2 doses. Business rule: Determine if the client is due for a hepatitis A vaccination according to the national immunization schedule Trigger: IMMZ.D2 Determine required vaccination(s) if any Table: Inactivated hepatitis A virus (HAV), 2-dose schedule
